title: malus rockii
intro: Malus rockii, also known as the Tibetan apple or Rock's apple, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Malus rockii include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or tea, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
